My Daily Routine

Hi! I'm Peter. I live in London with my family. This is my daily routine.

I wake up 0 at 7 o'clock. I 1 brush my teeth and wash my face. Then I 2 have breakfast. I 3 usually eat cereal with milk. I leave home at 8 o'clock and walk to school. I 4 finish school at 3 o'clock.

At home, I do 5 my homework. At 7 o'clock I have 6 with my family. 7 dinner, I watch TV or read a book.

My Hobby

My favourite hobby is playing the guitar. I 8 to guitar club twice a week. I love music 9 it makes me happy. Before I sleep, I listen to music 10 my phone.
